requirements.task_name: Book a 7-day guided tour to Japan in April 2025 under $2,000 per person for 2 adults with 3-star hotels
requirements.task_description: Find a guided tour to Japan that lasts exactly 7 days, departs in April 2025, costs at most $2,000 per person, and add a booking for 2 adults with 3-star accommodation to the cart or booking flow.

required_variables.set_condition: On every call to searchTours, after computing filtered and sorted results but before returning.
required_variables.value_to_set: An object containing the call arguments and pagination, e.g. { destinationCountry, startDate, endDate, minDurationDays, maxDurationDays, maxPricePerPerson, accommodationLevels, sortBy, page, pageSize, timestamp: new Date().toISOString() }
required_variables.reason: Allows the evaluator to verify that at least one tour search used the correct filters and sorting (Japan, April 2025 date window, duration 7 days, max price 2000, and sortBy 'price_low_to_high'), instead of only knowing that a correct booking eventually existed.

requirements.task_name: Create a 'Paris Weekend' reading list with 3 museum-related blog posts
requirements.task_description: Use the blog to find and save exactly 3 articles about Paris museums, then create a reading list called 'Paris Weekend' and add those 3 saved articles to that list.

requirements.task_name: Compare two Spain beach packages in July 2025 and add the higher-rated one (ties broken by lower price) to wishlist
requirements.task_description: Find beach vacation packages in Spain for July 2025 with ratings 4.0 or higher, compare the first two, and add the one with the higher rating (or lower price if ratings are equal) to the wishlist.

required_variables.set_condition: On every call to searchPackages, after filtering and sorting but before returning.
required_variables.value_to_set: An object capturing the call arguments and pagination, e.g. { destinationCountry, theme, travelMonth, minDurationNights, maxDurationNights, minRating, maxPricePerPerson, sortBy, page, pageSize, timestamp: new Date().toISOString() }
required_variables.reason: Allows the evaluator to verify that at least one package search used the correct filters (destination Spain, theme beach, month July 2025, duration 5–7 nights, rating ≥4.0) and any required sorting.

required_variables.set_condition: Whenever getPackageComparison is called with a non-empty array of packageIds; overwrite with the most recent comparison.
required_variables.value_to_set: An object like { packageIds, timestamp: new Date().toISOString() }, where packageIds is the array (or the first two IDs if more are passed).
required_variables.reason: Persists which packages were compared so the evaluator can check that (a) the first two filtered results were compared (if necessary) and (b) the wishlist item corresponds to the higher-rated (or, if tied, lower-priced) package among those compared.

requirements.task_name: Select the cheapest non-stop flight + hotel bundle from Los Angeles to New York under $1,200 for Sept 10–13, 2025
requirements.task_description: Search for flight + hotel bundles from Los Angeles (LAX) to New York (JFK) for September 10–13, 2025 for 1 adult, filter to non-stop flights, sort by lowest total price, and start booking the cheapest option under $1,200.

required_variables.set_condition: On every call to searchBundles, after filtering and sorting but before returning.
required_variables.value_to_set: An object capturing the call arguments and pagination, e.g. { originAirportCode, destinationAirportCode, departureDate, returnDate, adults, nonStopOnly, maxTotalPrice, sortBy, page, pageSize, timestamp: new Date().toISOString() }
required_variables.reason: Enables verification that the user searched bundles with the correct origin (LAX), destination (JFK), dates (2025-09-10 to 2025-09-13), non-stop-only filter enabled, and sorting by total price low to high, with an appropriate max price threshold.

requirements.task_name: Sign up for a weekly budget travel newsletter using a test email
requirements.task_description: Access the newsletter subscription form, choose budget travel topics, set the frequency to weekly, and subscribe using the email address test@example.com.

requirements.task_name: Reserve a family-friendly Rome hotel for Aug 1–5, 2025 with 4.5+ rating, free breakfast and Wi-Fi under $250/night
requirements.task_description: Find a family-friendly hotel in Rome, Italy for 2 adults and 2 children from August 1–5, 2025 with guest rating at least 4.5, free breakfast, free Wi-Fi, and a price of at most $250 per night, then select a free-cancellation room and add it to the cart.

required_variables.set_condition: On every call to searchHotels, after filtering and sorting but before returning.
required_variables.value_to_set: An object capturing the call arguments and pagination, e.g. { city, country, checkInDate, checkOutDate, adults, children, maxPricePerNight, minGuestRating, amenities, familyFriendlyOnly, sortBy, page, pageSize, timestamp: new Date().toISOString() }
required_variables.reason: Allows the evaluator to confirm that the user searched for Rome, Italy hotels for the correct dates, with familyFriendlyOnly=true, free breakfast and free Wi-Fi in amenities, minGuestRating ≥4.5, maxPricePerNight ≤250, and the required sort order.

requirements.task_name: Choose a mid-tier travel insurance plan for a $3,000, 14-day trip and review policy details
requirements.task_description: Use the blog to reach the insurance services page, select the mid-tier (Standard) insurance plan, configure it for a $3,000 trip lasting 14 days from June 1–14, 2025, and proceed to the policy review page.

requirements.task_name: Build and save a 6-night Italy itinerary (Rome, Florence, Venice) for May 10, 2025 with 3-star hotels and tours
requirements.task_description: Use the Custom Trip Builder to create a multi-city itinerary in Italy: 2 nights in Rome, 2 nights in Florence, and 2 nights in Venice starting May 10, 2025, with 3-star hotels and at least one guided tour in Rome and Venice, then save the itinerary as 'Italy May 2025'.
